'''Kushibah''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was home to the primitive lagomorph [[Kushiban]] species, most notably the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ikrit]]. The planet had no cities and limited technology.

The native Kushibans were mainly farmers and weavers. They were famous for their hand-woven textiles which involved growing [[silkweed]] and combining it with fur they brushed from their coats daily and then spinning it with thread. The thread would then be used to weave cloth and tapestries in a wide variety of colors.

The planet was also home to the fearsome [[xinkra]]—three meter tall predators which were feared by the other native species. Ikrit saved his village from a pack of these creatures by using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to convince the xinkra to seek food elsewhere.

==Appearances==
